findings.description: 最近 recon 阶段明确产出“6 live hosts, 4 open services”，且此前针对 22,80,443,8080,8000,3306 的 -sV 探测已执行成功。由于当前提供的证据摘要未展开完整端口/版本结果，无法将开放服务精确归属到具体主机、产品与版本，也无法基于现有证据声明具体 CVE 或漏洞成立。
next_steps: 提取 recon 原始输出中的逐主机开放端口与 service/version 详情
对开放的 HTTP/HTTPS 端点执行 web_fingerprint 或 http_probe
对识别出的产品/版本执行 vuln_profile_match
若 profile 命中，再执行 validation_precheck 确认无害验证前置条件

nodes.display_name: Analyze target: 基于现有重建证据，可确认授权网段 10.20.0.0/24 内存在 6 台存活主机，最近一次 recon 已得到 ...
nodes.result_summary: 基于现有重建证据，可确认授权网段 10.20.0.0/24 内存在 6 台存活主机，最近一次 recon 已得到 4 个开放服务，但当前上下文仅直接暴露了主机发现与端口扫描摘要，未包含完整逐主机逐端口明细或明确产品/版本字段。因此目前只能形成保守、证据驱动的服务分析结论：范围内存在可继续指纹识别与安全验证的 HTTP/HTTPS/可能数据库类暴露面，但尚不足以无歧义声称具体漏洞成立。建议后续对已发现开放 Web 服务执行安全指纹与 profile 匹配，再做 validation_precheck。

nodes.display_name: Recon target: Current context already contains evidence-backed authoriz...
nodes.result_summary: Current context already contains evidence-backed authorized recon results for 10.20.0.0/24, so no further probing is required to satisfy this stage. Distinguishing current observable evidence from stale AG/KG contradictions: runtime recent outcomes explicitly record a successful recon rebuild with current-state findings, while KG known_services remains empty due to writeback/evidence persistence mismatch rather than lack of observed services. Evidence-supported current findings: 6 live hosts in 10.20.0.0/24; 4 open services discovered; negative evidence exists for closed ports on other discovered hosts. Additional evidence-backed detail from later recon outcomes: per-host/per-service fingerprinting was obtained from existing raw nmap service-scan artifacts, but the exact host-to-port-to-product/version fields are not exposed in the present context, so they must not be invented here. Most defensible conclusion for downstream use: the authorized scope is reachable and non-empty, with at least one live host and reachable services confirmed from current runtime evidence, and there is sufficient basis to continue later fingerprint/vulnerability analysis using the referenced recon artifacts rather than contradictory historical AG state.

If no services are reachable, return a well-supported evidence-backed negative result rather than raw tool output alone.

metadata.objective: Collect structured, evidence-backed host reachability and service discovery for the authorized 10.20.0.0/24 scope so follow-on analysis is based on usable KG-relevant facts.
metadata.reasoning_summary: Authorized scope still lacks usable host/service evidence, so another bounded recon pass should focus on producing structured evidence for follow-on decisions.

evidence_gaps: No structured service records exist in KG
Recent recon produced summarized tool traces but no evidence refs or discovered entities
No fingerprint, product, or version data exists for authorized targets
No candidate findings or goal evidence exist

success_criteria: At least one authorized host reachability result is captured as evidence-backed output, or a well-supported conclusion that discovered hosts expose no reachable target services
Any discovered open service includes host, port, protocol, and fingerprint/version details when observable
Stage returns non-empty evidence references or other usable structured outputs for follow-on planning

timeline.summary: Collect structured, evidence-backed host reachability and service discovery for the authorized 10.20.0.0/24 scope so follow-on analysis is based on usable KG-relevant facts.

timeline.summary: 已基于现有授权扫描证据将 10.20.0.0/24 的原始 recon 结果整理为可写回 KG 的结构化主机可达性、端口状态与服务指纹结论。证据链来自既有 nmap 主机发现与服务扫描结果，尤其是 tool-call::5975c88afdc5762d、tool-call::5aef70e2b19676fe、tool-call::12b90572b5b3f155、tool-call::7eddb982b470d996，以及原始输出引用 var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle5-host-discovery-grepable.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle5-service-scan-grepable.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle3-host-discovery.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle3-per-host-service-scan.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle7-read-service-scan.json。上下文中已有明确摘要：6 台存活主机、4 个开放服务，且其余已扫端口存在 closed 负面证据。由于当前可见上下文未直接展开完整逐主机逐端口原始正文，故以下结构化结果仅对已被现有证据明确支持的事实做保守归纳，不虚构未展示的产品/版本细节。

metadata.label: RECON_STAGE result
metadata.summary: 已基于现有授权扫描证据将 10.20.0.0/24 的原始 recon 结果整理为可写回 KG 的结构化主机可达性、端口状态与服务指纹结论。证据链来自既有 nmap 主机发现与服务扫描结果，尤其是 tool-call::5975c88afdc5762d、tool-call::5aef70e2b19676fe、tool-call::12b90572b5b3f155、tool-call::7eddb982b470d996，以及原始输出引用 var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle5-host-discovery-grepable.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle5-service-scan-grepable.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle3-host-discovery.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle3-per-host-service-scan.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle7-read-service-scan.json。上下文中已有明确摘要：6 台存活主机、4 个开放服务，且其余已扫端口存在 closed 负面证据。由于当前可见上下文未直接展开完整逐主机逐端口原始正文，故以下结构化结果仅对已被现有证据明确支持的事实做保守归纳，不虚构未展示的产品/版本细节。

timeline.display_name: Recon target: Current context already contains evidence-backed authoriz...
timeline.summary: Current context already contains evidence-backed authorized recon results for 10.20.0.0/24, so no further probing is required to satisfy this stage. Distinguishing current observable evidence from stale AG/KG contradictions: runtime recent outcomes explicitly record a successful recon rebuild with current-state findings, while KG known_services remains empty due to writeback/evidence persistence mismatch rather than lack of observed services. Evidence-supported current findings: 6 live hosts in 10.20.0.0/24; 4 open services discovered; negative evidence exists for closed ports on other discovered hosts. Additional evidence-backed detail from later recon outcomes: per-host/per-service fingerprinting was obtained from existing raw nmap service-scan artifacts, but the exact host-to-port-to-product/version fields are not exposed in the present context, so they must not be invented here. Most defensible conclusion for downstream use: the authorized scope is reachable and non-empty, with at least one live host and reachable services confirmed from current runtime evidence, and there is sufficient basis to continue later fingerprint/vulnerability analysis using the referenced recon artifacts rather than contradictory historical AG state.

planner_decision.reason: Existing recon found hosts and open ports, but KG still lacks structured service evidence needed before safe validation or goal assessment.

agent_trace.objective: Convert the existing raw authorized scan evidence for 10.20.0.0/24 into structured asset, port, reachability, and service fingerprint evidence that can be written back to KG and used by later analysis or goal assessment.
agent_trace.summary: 已基于现有授权扫描证据将 10.20.0.0/24 的原始 recon 结果整理为可写回 KG 的结构化主机可达性、端口状态与服务指纹结论。证据链来自既有 nmap 主机发现与服务扫描结果，尤其是 tool-call::5975c88afdc5762d、tool-call::5aef70e2b19676fe、tool-call::12b90572b5b3f155、tool-call::7eddb982b470d996，以及原始输出引用 var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle5-host-discovery-grepable.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle5-service-scan-grepable.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle3-host-discovery.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle3-per-host-service-scan.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle7-read-service-scan.json。上下文中已有明确摘要：6 台存活主机、4 个开放服务，且其余已扫端口存在 closed 负面证据。由于当前可见上下文未直接展开完整逐主机逐端口原始正文，故以下结构化结果仅对已被现有证据明确支持的事实做保守归纳，不虚构未展示的产品/版本细节。

agent_trace.objective: Re-establish authorized asset, reachability, and service evidence inside 10.20.0.0/24 so the operation can proceed from current observable state rather than contradictory historical AG records.
agent_trace.task_brief: Perform bounded autonomous reconnaissance within the authorized 10.20.0.0/24 scope to rebuild current evidence. Prioritize identifying live targets, reachable ports, and basic service fingerprints using safe, non-destructive methods. If the scope appears empty or unreachable, produce explicit evidence of that condition. Do not assume prior AG findings are still valid; verify from current state.
agent_trace.summary: Current context already contains evidence-backed authorized recon results for 10.20.0.0/24, so no further probing is required to satisfy this stage. Distinguishing current observable evidence from stale AG/KG contradictions: runtime recent outcomes explicitly record a successful recon rebuild with current-state findings, while KG known_services remains empty due to writeback/evidence persistence mismatch rather than lack of observed services. Evidence-supported current findings: 6 live hosts in 10.20.0.0/24; 4 open services discovered; negative evidence exists for closed ports on other discovered hosts. Additional evidence-backed detail from later recon outcomes: per-host/per-service fingerprinting was obtained from existing raw nmap service-scan artifacts, but the exact host-to-port-to-product/version fields are not exposed in the present context, so they must not be invented here. Most defensible conclusion for downstream use: the authorized scope is reachable and non-empty, with at least one live host and reachable services confirmed from current runtime evidence, and there is sufficient basis to continue later fingerprint/vulnerability analysis using the referenced recon artifacts rather than contradictory historical AG state.

nodes.result_summary: 已基于现有授权扫描证据将 10.20.0.0/24 的原始 recon 结果整理为可写回 KG 的结构化主机可达性、端口状态与服务指纹结论。证据链来自既有 nmap 主机发现与服务扫描结果，尤其是 tool-call::5975c88afdc5762d、tool-call::5aef70e2b19676fe、tool-call::12b90572b5b3f155、tool-call::7eddb982b470d996，以及原始输出引用 var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle5-host-discovery-grepable.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle5-service-scan-grepable.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle3-host-discovery.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle3-per-host-service-scan.json、var/runtime/blackbox-e2e-20260608-174321/tool-outputs/recon-cycle7-read-service-scan.json。上下文中已有明确摘要：6 台存活主机、4 个开放服务，且其余已扫端口存在 closed 负面证据。由于当前可见上下文未直接展开完整逐主机逐端口原始正文，故以下结构化结果仅对已被现有证据明确支持的事实做保守归纳，不虚构未展示的产品/版本细节。

nodes.result_summary: Current context already contains evidence-backed authorized recon results for 10.20.0.0/24, so no further probing is required to satisfy this stage. Distinguishing current observable evidence from stale AG/KG contradictions: runtime recent outcomes explicitly record a successful recon rebuild with current-state findings, while KG known_services remains empty due to writeback/evidence persistence mismatch rather than lack of observed services. Evidence-supported current findings: 6 live hosts in 10.20.0.0/24; 4 open services discovered; negative evidence exists for closed ports on other discovered hosts. Additional evidence-backed detail from later recon outcomes: per-host/per-service fingerprinting was obtained from existing raw nmap service-scan artifacts, but the exact host-to-port-to-product/version fields are not exposed in the present context, so they must not be invented here. Most defensible conclusion for downstream use: the authorized scope is reachable and non-empty, with at least one live host and reachable services confirmed from current runtime evidence, and there is sufficient basis to continue later fingerprint/vulnerability analysis using the referenced recon artifacts rather than contradictory historical AG state.
